tools.name: git_clone
tools.description: Clone a remote repository into a local directory.

directory.description: Directory name or path for the cloned repository (e.g. 'my-repo'). Relative names are resolved to the sandbox directory.

path.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix). Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

tools.name: git_pull
tools.description: Pull changes from a remote repository into the current branch.

remote.description: Remote name (e.g. 'origin', 'upstream'). Must be specified explicitly when the branch has no tracking remote configured.

branch.description: Branch name to pull (e.g. 'main'). Must be specified explicitly when the branch has no tracking information configured.

path.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix). Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

tools.name: git_push
tools.description: Push local commits to a remote repository.

set_upstream.description: Set the remote branch as the tracking upstream (use on first push of a new branch)

remote.description: Remote name (e.g. 'origin'). Must be specified explicitly when pushing a branch for the first time (no tracking remote configured).

branch.description: Branch name to push (e.g. 'feature/add-search'). Must be specified explicitly when the branch has no upstream configured.

path.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix). Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.

tools.name: git_remote
tools.description: List configured remote repositories with their URLs.

path.description: Repository path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix). Defaults to the sandbox root if omitted.
